top_findings.title: No Java source files in workspace
top_findings.evidence: find src -type f -name '*.java' returns 0 results; only src/test/resources/application.properties exists. Workspace has pom.xml, README.md, and config but zero .java files
top_findings.suggestion: Agent failed to emit Java source code; only scaffolding (pom.xml, README.md, test properties) was archived

top_findings.title: POST /books endpoint missing — no controller code
top_findings.evidence: No Java source files in workspace; no BookController or equivalent exists under src/main/java/
top_findings.suggestion: Implement a Spring Boot @RestController with @PostMapping for /books

top_findings.title: GET /books list endpoint missing
top_findings.evidence: No Java source files in workspace; no controller with @GetMapping for /books
top_findings.suggestion: Implement a @GetMapping("/books") handler returning all books

top_findings.title: GET /books ?author= filter missing
top_findings.evidence: No Java source files; no query parameter handling code exists
top_findings.suggestion: Add @RequestParam(required=false) String author to the list endpoint

top_findings.title: GET /books/{id} endpoint missing
top_findings.evidence: No Java source files; no get-by-id route exists
